changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-config/src/model.rs:1881-2025

Uncovered lines: 1890, 1892, 1894, 1896-1899, 1904, 1907, 1909, 1912, 1919, 1926, 1937, 1947, 1956-1958, 1989, 2000, 2002, 2005-2008, 2012-2013, 2015, 2018

```rust
fn load_or_create_config(config_path: &Path) -> Result<serde_yaml_ng::Value, ModelError>
fn save_config(config_path: &Path, config: &serde_yaml_ng::Value) -> Result<(), ModelError>
fn check_file_readable(path: &Path) -> Result<(), ModelError>
fn update_config_with_agent(config: &mut serde_yaml_ng::Value, agent_name: &str) -> Result<(), ModelError>
```

These handle config file I/O with security checks. Uncovered: file-too-large check, file read errors, null YAML normalization, non-file path rejection, permission checks, config serialization size guard, and write errors. Test with tempdir: write a valid config then load it, write an empty YAML, test the oversized config guard, and test save_config round-trip.
Add tests for ModelManager::load_or_create_config and save_config
